title: Structural-exhaustion contract instance
description: Validates one fully populated S-* or A-* mathematical contract used to discharge a proof-flow node. The S-* variants type the lemma-schema alphabet of the structural exhaustion framework (branch_closure_methodology_extended.tex, 'Lemma schemas'); the A-* variants and S-Prove are package extensions for certificate validation, scope audit, admission, and displayed propositions. Field meanings and content requirements are defined on the referenced union and its variants.
